chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA Nos. 405 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection as at ‘A’. 2) For hearing of Main Case. 3) For hearing of CMA No.4055/2022. 11.08.2025. Mr. Riaz Ahmed Phulpoto, Advocate for Appellant in HCA No.405 of 2020. Mr. Ziaul Haq Makhdoom, Advocate for Appellant in HCA No.423 of 2020. Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, A.A.G., Sindh. ________________ Learned counsel for the parties have made arguments at some length and have agreed to the disposal of this appeal in the terms whereby trial Court is directed to proceed with the suit on merits, record evidence and decide it within a period of six months from the date of receipt of this order. The appeal stands disposed of along with pending application(s) in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
